title: Gentle Hands
lesson: Be gentle and kind to little animals.
prompts: Place the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image into a sunny home garden, kneeling on soft green grass and beaming with excitement at a small fluffy brown puppy sitting a little way ahead. Medium shot at eye level, head turned toward the camera so the face stays clearly visible, the face facing the camera and fully unobstructed. Warm natural sunlight, flowers and a low wooden fence behind, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

Transform the scene in the same sunny home garden: the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image leans forward and reaches out both hands too eagerly toward a small fluffy brown puppy, while the puppy shrinks back and tucks its tail, ears flattened. Medium shot at eye level, the person's head turned toward the camera so the face stays clearly visible, face front-on and unobstructed with a surprised expression. Warm light, green grass and flowers, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

A scene in the same sunny home garden. The {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image kneels on the far left in the mid-ground, head turned toward the camera so the face stays clearly visible, watching attentively. In the right foreground, {GENDER_M_AGE_35_RACE_ASIAN_PARENT} crouches calmly and holds out one slow, open hand to show how to be soft and gentle with a small fluffy brown puppy. Eye-level medium-wide shot, warm light, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

The {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image kneels alone on the soft grass of the sunny home garden, very gently stroking the back of a small fluffy brown puppy with one slow, soft hand. Medium shot at eye level, head turned toward the camera so the face stays clearly visible, the face front-on, unobstructed, with a calm, tender smile. Warm sunlight, flowers in the background, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

Place the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image sitting on the grass in the sunny home garden as a small fluffy brown puppy relaxes and snuggles up against their side, eyes softly closed and tail wagging. Medium shot at eye level, the person facing the camera with their face fully visible and a gentle, happy expression, head turned toward the camera so the face stays clearly visible. Warm golden light, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

A warm closing scene in the sunny home garden. The {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image sits on the far left, facing the camera with their face fully visible and a joyful smile, gently cradling a happy, content small fluffy brown puppy in their lap. To the right, {GENDER_M_AGE_35_RACE_ASIAN_PARENT} sits beside them, looking on proudly. Eye-level medium-wide shot, warm golden sunlight, flowers and a low wooden fence behind, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.
texts: In the sunny garden you met a little brown puppy. "Hello, puppy!" you said, full of excitement.
You reached out too fast, and the puppy shrank back, afraid. Oh no — that was too quick.
Dad knelt down beside you. "Be gentle," he said softly, holding out one slow, open hand.
So you stroked the puppy very gently, soft and slow. The puppy stayed close, calm and happy.
The puppy snuggled right up against you, its tail wagging. Being gentle had made a new friend!
You cuddled the happy puppy in your lap. "Good job," Dad smiled. Gentle hands are kind hands.
